ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the string of characters you want to use to indicate when you want to push content to a new note.
ast.target: 指定您希望用于指示何时将内容推送到新笔记的字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the string of characters you want to use within the curly brackts to customize how the content is pushed.
ast.target: 指定您希望在花括号内使用的字符串，以自定义内容的推送方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically push content to a new note, when your cursor moves to a new line (without you running a command).
ast.target: 当光标移动到新行时（无需运行命令），自动将内容推送到新笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If a file already exists, prepends the content to the existing file instead of putting it at the end.
ast.target: 如果文件已存在，则将内容添加到现有文件的开头，而不是放在末尾。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在创建文件并推送内容...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Didn't detect correct syntax. Doing nothing
ast.target: 未检测到正确的语法。不执行任何操作
